name: Clear Hurricane 3" x 4" Pillar Candle Holder - Room Essentials™
description:
Sleek and simple, the Clear Hurricane 3" x 4" Pillar Candle Holder - Room Essentials™ effortlessly complements any decor. The plain appearance of the glass allows the candle's natural beauty to shine. Crafted from durable glass, it adds a touch of sophistication to any space. Easy to clean and maintain, this holder from Room Essentials™ ensures a fuss-free candlelight experience.

Room Essentials™: Everyday value.
